arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold explains how Arne Slot inspired Liverpool comeback to beat AC Milan
arts.sum: Liverpool recovered from conceding an early goal to overpower AC Milan in the San Siro and Trent Alexander-Arnold says Arne Slot changes his tactics constantly from the sidelines

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Reds suffer Khvicha Kvaratskhelia transfer blow?
arts.sum: Liverpool are one of a number of top European clubs who appear to have suffered a blow in their pursuit of Napoli winger Khvicha Kvaratskhelia.

arts.ttl: I don't think anyone is better for Liverpool than Alisson - but Ederson truth remains
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news and gossip as former Premier League goalkeeper Ben Foster makes a claim about Reds star Alisson Becker

arts.ttl: I could have done more at Liverpool - but Luis Suarez was a phenomenon and father to me
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news and gossip as Luis Alberto talks about his time at Anfield and praises former teammate Luis Suarez

arts.ttl: Real Madrid-linked Trent Alexander-Arnold drops hint over Liverpool future
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold reveals that he is "excited" for the future at Liverpool despite reports linking him with a transfer to Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Liverpool fans say their 'day has been ruined' after seeing Alisson has shaved off his iconic beard as they joke that they're about to 'concede for fun'
arts.sum: A Liverpool fan account posted an image of the fresh-faced 31-year-old sharing a joke with Alexis Mac Allister, writing: 'clean shaven Alisson has entered the arena.'

arts.ttl: Liverpool summer signing vows to 'give everything' after 'very difficult' start
arts.sum: Giorgi Mamardashvili will join the Reds next summer but the goalkeeper is hoping to keep Valencia in La Liga first

arts.ttl: Arsenal star edges closer to exit with Gunners eyeing Liverpool target to replace him
arts.sum: Arsenal could lose of their key players next year with interest increasing in his services from the Middle East. According to Teamtalk, midfielder Thomas Partey is likely to leave the club at the end of the season. The Gunners have already identified his replacement and that could initiate a transfer battle with their Premier League […] The post Arsenal star edges closer to exit with Gunners eyeing Liverpool target to replace him appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Liverpool linked with Egypt teammate as Salah replacement
arts.sum: Liverpool are being linked with a move to sign Egypt international Omar Marmoush as a potential replacement for Mohamed Salah. Salah is out of contract at the end of the current campaign and there has been no progress on an extension to his deal. The 31-year-old revealed earlier this week that no one from […] The post Liverpool linked with Egypt teammate as Salah replacement first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold offers Liverpool contract hint amid Real Madrid interest
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold is 'excited' for the future at Liverpool, despite rumours linking him with a move to Real Madrid. "For me, it was just an excitement to work under a new manager that I've never had before," he said after his side's opening UEFA Champions League victory over Milan .
